name: Fashion Artisans Collective
summary: Central institution for Shelk design culture, artisan collaboration, apprenticeship, and public showcase.
day_to_day: Coordinates designers, trains apprentices, manages workshops, and stages seasonal displays.
who_works_there: Master designers, tailors, dyers, apprentices, merchant liaisons, quality foremen.
who_uses_it: Artisans, nobles, merchants, students, and visiting buyers.
authority: Sets quality expectations and cultural prestige rather than pure coercive law.
public_manifestation: Guildhall workshops, showcase events, training programs, and design commissions.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Counterfeits, design theft, and raw-material shortages threaten both income and civic identity.
